global.execution: Simulated fills at current real market price with 0.25% friction
global.hard_rule: NEVER place real orders anywhere. This is a file-based simulation only.

sleeve_core_spy.trend_brake: 200-day simple moving average; if SPY < 200-DMA reduce to 25%, if back above restore to 50%
sleeve_core_spy.notes: Quality gate exempt (broad ETF); exempt from committee; allocation move only

sleeve_momentum_mtum.rebalance_frequency: First trading day of month OR when VIX bucket changes
sleeve_momentum_mtum.notes: Quality gate exempt (broad ETF); exempt from committee; allocation move only

sleeve_insider_clusters.signal_definition: 2+ distinct insiders buying >= $25k each within ~7 days of common stocks, price > $5, not held, not in cooldown
sleeve_insider_clusters.earnings_proximity_check: Defer if earnings within 3 trading days
sleeve_insider_clusters.notes: Full quality gate and committee apply; shadow ledger tracks vetoes

sleeve_smart_money_13f.signal_definition: NEW position or >25% increase in existing holdings vs prior quarter filing; max 5 candidates per filing

sleeve_congress.source: Capitol Trades (blocked across all endpoints, 14+ consecutive trading days)
sleeve_congress.note: No capital allocated; tracked in shadow ledger for grading

macro_rules.risk_off_definition: VIX > 25, OR major new war/escalation, OR US market circuit-breaker, OR Fed emergency action
macro_rules.risk_off_action: Halve all new buy sizes; skip buys in affected sectors
macro_rules.extreme_risk_off_definition: VIX > 35 or SPY down >4% in one day

quality_gate.exemptions: Broad ETFs (SPY, MTUM) and low-turnover managers (Berkshire, marked 'trusted')

operational_details.dynamic_sizing: Base buy = 2% of current total portfolio value
operational_details.macro_data_unavailable: Default to RISK_OFF (halve sizes), never NORMAL
operational_details.instrument_filter: Common stocks only; options/bonds/private placements skipped; broad ETFs allowed
operational_details.earnings_proximity: Defer buys if earnings within 3 trading days
